name: Absolute Finance
description_short: Oklahoma-based personal loan lender offering signature loans up to $3,100 with approval in 30 minutes or less. Serves borrowers building/rebuilding credit with local, personalized service.
description_long:
Absolute Finance is a locally-owned personal loan company based in Oklahoma City that has positioned itself as a community-focused alternative to larger national lenders. The company operates a physical office location and emphasizes personal relationships over transactional processing, with messaging specifically welcoming applicants with poor or no credit history.

The company's primary product is signature loans (unsecured personal loans) with a maximum loan amount of $3,100 and a stated approval timeline of 30 minutes or less. They accept applications online, by phone, or in-person. The company offers online payment functionality, allowing borrowers to manage their accounts remotely. They also operate a referral program that pays existing customers $50 per referral ($60 for multiple referrals in the same year) to encourage word-of-mouth growth.

Absolute Finance differentiates itself through explicitly welcoming borrowers with damaged credit or no credit history, emphasizing that past financial mistakes won't disqualify applicants. The company highlights transparency in loan terms, monthly payment amounts, and due dates. Their marketing emphasizes personalized service with staff taking time to understand individual circumstances, positioning themselves as an alternative to impersonal large lenders.

As a small-dollar personal loan provider, Absolute Finance is best suited for borrowers with limited access to traditional bank financing who need quick cash for emergencies, vacations, or credit-building purposes. However, the relatively low maximum loan amount ($3,100) and the company's focus on speed and ease of approval suggest this may be a higher-cost lending product compared to traditional banks. APR and fee information are not disclosed on the website, which is a significant limitation for consumer research.
address: 1215 N Western Ave STE 200, Oklahoma City, OK 73106

company_info.headquarters: 1215 N Western Ave STE 200, Oklahoma City, OK 73106

pros: Fast approval process with 30-minute or less decisions stated
Explicitly welcomes borrowers with poor credit or no credit history
Offers online payment management for loan administration
Local Oklahoma-based company with community focus and in-person service
Transparent about loan terms, monthly payments, and due dates
Referral program rewards existing customers ($50-$60 per successful referral)
Multiple application methods: online, phone (405-500-5626), or walk-in
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on website—critical pricing transparency missing
Low maximum loan amount of $3,100 limits usefulness for larger financial needs
No information about underwriting criteria, credit score requirements, or debt-to-income thresholds
Limited geographic availability (Oklahoma-based only) despite online application option
No details on loan terms, repayment periods, or prepayment penalties
best_for: Oklahoma residents needing $1,000–$3,100 for emergency expenses or unexpected costs
Borrowers with poor credit or no credit history seeking quick approval and personal service
Consumers looking to build credit history through installment loan payment activity
Individuals preferring in-person interaction with local staff over online-only lenders
diagnosis: Absolute Finance is best for Oklahoma borrowers with poor or nonexistent credit who need quick access to small-dollar loans ($1,000–$3,100) and prefer personalized, local service. The critical caveat is the complete absence of APR, interest rate, and fee information on their website—essential data needed to evaluate whether this is a high-cost lending product and to compare it fairly against alternatives like credit unions, payday alternatives, or bank personal loans.
services: Online payment processing and loan management
Credit-building loans for borrowers with poor or no credit
Customer referral program ($50-$60 per successful referral)
